title: Item Catalog
description: Player-facing items and their effects, expressed as DATA (DDTank ItemTemplateInfo: effect type + value), per ADR-0005. Loaded by Sim.Content.ItemCatalog.FromJson; hosts read the file, /sim parses the text. Item use is server-authoritative — the client never resolves or applies effects, it only displays. SCOPE (system #3): two effect kinds — GrantBall (references a balls.json id) and RestoreHp (flat amount). DEFERRED: equipment categories and the base+equip+rune+costume+buff modifier stack that assembles effective stats (system #4); the 1.1^StrengthenLevel / countBonus heal scaling (needs enhancement levels); in-match drops/pickup/quota. Values here are first-pass tuning, iterated later.

id.description: Stable lookup key. Must be unique within the catalog.

displayName.description: Display-only label. Has no effect on resolution.

category.description: Item category. Starter set only; equipment categories arrive with system #4.

kind.description: Effect discriminator. GrantBall requires ballId; RestoreHp requires amount.

ballId.description: GrantBall: the balls.json shell id this item makes available. Must reference a valid ball.

amount.description: RestoreHp: flat hit points restored (clamped to max HP at resolution; no overheal).
